name: @webtoe/wasm-kernels
description: AssemblyScript sources for WebToe's WASM kernels (video pixel conversion). The committed .wasm artifact ships with the app; JS fallbacks in @webtoe/ops remain the reference.

scripts.build: asc assembly/index.ts -o build/video-kernels.wasm --runtime stub -O3 && cp build/video-kernels.wasm ../../apps/web/public/wasm/video-kernels.wasm
